name: standards-refresh.sh skips an entry whose last-fetch marker is within the fetch_frequency window (freshness-skip)
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r07-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

x

HTML cat > $OUT/test-sources.yaml < .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/r07-src.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --registry $OUT/test-sources.yaml --now 2026-07-11T00:00:00Z --out-dir $OUT/out 2>e.err; grep -q 'SKIP sid=r07-src' e.err && grep -q 'total=1 processed=0 skipped=1' e.err && echo freshness-skip-honored 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
